positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a mystical celestial garden at twilight. A central composition featuring stylized, bioluminescent flora (moonflowers, glowing ferns, and abstract crystalline vines) framing a crescent moon and three geometric, abstract star clusters. The color palette should be deep indigo, ethereal turquoise, soft lavender, and pops of luminous gold. Emphasize clean line work, strong contrast, and negative space. The style is high-end modern nature art, optimized for screen printing on apparel. Flat design meets detailed linework. Symmetry and balance are key.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, noise, low detail, photorealism, 3d render, ugly, bad anatomy, extra limbs, copyright, logo, trademark
